view.title: Validate explicit UC need #1
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 1 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step successfully validates the requirement for a monthly credit allowance of 4 massage credits by referencing the linked use case, which explicitly states that the spa membership includes 4 service credits per month. Additionally, the prior steps confirm that the system allows for the booking of services using these credits, as evidenced by the successful booking records. This direct correlation between the requirement and the evidence provided supports the conclusion that the requirement is fully covered.
